text: Apple has officially launched the iPhone seventeen e, its most affordable new model, starting at five hundred ninety-nine dollars with two hundred fifty-six gigabytes of storage.
The device features Apple's in-house modem chip, replacing Qualcomm for the first time in iPhone history.
It also introduces a new aluminum design that is both thinner and lighter than previous models.
However, Bloomberg notes the upcoming Touch MacBook will stop well short of a full Mac-iPad hybrid.
Analysts say this product wave signals Apple's strategy to dominate every price tier in twenty twenty-six.
Apple is no longer just a premium brand.
By offering a powerful phone at five hundred ninety-nine dollars and building its own modem, the company is cutting costs while expanding its reach to millions of new customers worldwide.
